name: Tab Complete
desc: Player presses Tab in chat to request auto-completion. Sends the partial message or command.

fields.name: hasTargetBlock
fields.desc: Whether the cursor is over a block

fields.name: targetBlock
fields.desc: Block position the cursor is over

encoding: Whether cursor is over a block
notes: The server responds with S3APacketTabComplete containing matching commands/player names. The optional BlockPos allows for block-sensitive completions (e.g., filling /give with block IDs of looked-at block).

implementation.overview: C14PacketTabComplete requests auto-complete suggestions from the server when the player presses Tab. It carries the partial message string and optionally the looked-at block position (for block-sensitive completions like /setblock ~ ~ ~ stone → stone variants). The server responds with S3APacketTabComplete. AntiTabComplete modules cancel C14 to prevent the server from seeing what commands the player is tab-completing — this hides client command discovery from server admins.

modules.name: AntiTabComplete (Command Hider)
modules.purpose: Cancel C14PacketTabComplete to prevent the server from receiving tab-complete requests. This hides the client's command exploration from server logs and anti-cheat detection.
modules.how_it_works: When the player presses Tab while typing a command, the vanilla client sends C14. AntiTabComplete cancels this in EventSendPacket, so the server never sees which command the player is trying to tab-complete. The client still shows local tab-completion from the client's command system.
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayServer.processTabComplete(C14PacketTabComplete) — server generates a list of matching commands/player names and responds with S3APacketTabComplete. Client-side: GuiChat calls sendQueue.addToSendQueue() on Tab press.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: Cancelling TabComplete is not detectable by anti-cheats — it's not a gameplay-relevant packet. Some servers use TabComplete to detect X-Ray (if a player tab-completes ore names they shouldn't know about). AntiTabComplete prevents this data leak.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: GuiChat sends C14 on Tab press. Rise 6.0 PacketSendEvent, Gugustus EventSendPacket.

Server: NetHandlerPlayServer.processTabComplete(C14PacketTabComplete) generates suggestion list. S3APacketTabComplete is sent back.
implementation.client_variations: Gugustus: AntiTabComplete cancels C14. Rise 6.0: PingSpoofComponent may delay C14.
